item.title: imputnet/cobalt
item.description: best way to save what you love

item.title: thesubtleties/atria
item.description: Virtual and Hybrid Event management platform with real-time networking features. Create events, manage sessions, facilitate attendee connections, and enable live chat. Built with Flask, React, and Socket.IO.
